log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 9 (d20:9 + 0)
Lizardfolk — Armored Tank: 4 (d20:2 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Tank HP: 40/59
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:19+10=29 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Tank HP: 28/59
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 20] MISS!
⚡ Lizardfolk — Armored Tank casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:6 total 16 vs AC 20 — now MISSES!
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Tank's turn ---
Lizardfolk — Armored Tank casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Lizardfolk — Armored Tank's turn ---
Lizardfolk — Armored Tank casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS!
→ Half damage: 7
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 20] CRITICAL HIT! 20 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Tank HP: 27/59
→ Concentration save: [23 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 24 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Tank HP: 3/59
→ Lizardfolk — Armored Tank loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 21 damage. Lizardfolk — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
